description: Design a tidal turbine blade and simulate its performance in seawater to determine mechanical power output. The blade must utilize a NACA 63-818 airfoil (18% thickness) with a 5-meter radius, a root chord of approximately 0.8m, and a tip chord of approximately 0.4m. The airfoil analysis should be conducted at Re=1,000,000 and Ncrit=9, with the polar extrapolated to 360 degrees. Configure the simulation for seawater properties (Density: 1025 kg/m^3, Kinematic Viscosity: 1.0e-6 m^2/s) at a flow velocity of 2.5 m/s. Save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/tidal_project.wpa and record the mechanical power output in kW to /home/ga/Documents/tidal_report.txt.
